name: node-slash
title: node-slash
summary: Node.js library to convert Windows backslash paths to slash paths
description:
Node.js library to convert Windows backslash paths to slash paths
node-slash provides a simple way to convert Windows backslash paths to slash
paths: 'foo\bar' becomes 'foo/bar'
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-slash because Node.js library to convert Windows backslash paths to slash paths.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-slash as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-slash with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-slash --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
